company_name_alias: instant speed and security boost your website with cloudflare
description:
Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET) is the leading connectivity cloud company. It empowers organizations to make their employees, applications and networks faster and more secure everywhere, while reducing complexity and cost. Cloudflare’s connectivity cloud delivers the most full-featured, unified platform of cloud-native products and developer tools, so any organization can gain the control they need to work, develop, and accelerate their business. 

Powered by one of the world’s largest and most interconnected networks, Cloudflare blocks billions of threats online for its customers every day. It is trusted by millions of organizations – from the largest brands to entrepreneurs and small businesses to nonprofits, humanitarian groups, and governments across the globe.
description_metadata_raw: Make employees, applications and networks faster and more secure everywhere, while reducing complexity and cost.

company_updates.description: Cloudflare experienced a significant traffic outage on December 5, 2025, starting approximately at 8:47 UTC. The incident lasted approximately 25 minutes before resolution. We are sorry for the impact that it caused to our customers and the Internet. Here's what happened: https://cfl.re/4axyBQQ

A massive thank you to everyone who participated in and supported the recent Developer Day, proudly hosted by CCF and Cloudflare! 

We were thrilled to host this event in the beautiful city of Dali, Yunnan, China and especially want to thank all the developers who joined us to learn how Cloudflare can empower China to Global enterprises to effortlessly build powerful, full-stack applications. 

The energy and engagement were incredible!
Describe a debugging session that lasted way too long, only to be solved by something incredibly simple (the classic "typo" story). #CloudflareChat

It was a great opportunity to dive deep into the changing Internet landscape, AI adoption across the globe & the security challenges of the next generation of autonomous AI systems. 

Standout moments included Rohit C. keynote on the evolving threat landscape, where he presented valuable insights on the latest risks impacting organizations across the globe & the steps that Cloudflare is taking to help build a better Internet. Sachin Fernandes then facilitated an engineering deep-dive, guiding participants through deploying AI generated apps with security & performance baked in by default. The energy during the team-based incident response simulation that followed was truly inspiring.

Thank you to all the participants who joined us! We truly appreciate the support from Prof. Ranjana Jha and Majo Vineet Kumar (he/him), and we look forward to continuing these conversations as we work toward a trustworthy, resilient AI future together and also to The Asia Foundation &  INDIRA GANDHI DELHI TECHNICAL UNIVERSITY FOR WOMEN for all the support to make this event a success!

Curious about all the customer award winners from the inaugural Cloudflare Customer Awards?

Explore their stories and the innovative work they’re doing. Check out the full list of winners here: https://cfl.re/4rzxgPP

Join us in celebrating these trailblazers!

Is your “castle-and-moat” or hub-and-spoke network model failing your hybrid workforce?

Adopt "coffee shop networking" with Cloudflare One SASE for secure, simplified access anywhere. 

Learn more: https://cfl.re/4o0Tebr

Happening TODAY! LAST CHANCE to register for: "From Hub-and-Spoke to Cloud-First: Modernizing Branch Networks with SASE and a Connectivity Cloud Approach for Financial Services”

If you're an IT Security Leader battling legacy WAN challenges, high cyber threats, and regulatory pressure, this session is mandatory. Get practical solutions and learn the complete framework for SASE adoption.

Join us live to discover how a Connectivity Cloud delivers security, performance, and cost-efficiency. Register now: https://cfl.re/49E3lPW

#SASE #LiveWebinar #Cloudflare #BranchSecurity #ITSecurity

That’s a wrap on Black Hat Riyadh 2025!

A huge thank you to everyone who visited Cloudflare at Booth H1.N10, joined our sessions, and connected with our team over the past three days.

We loved the conversations, insights, and energy around building a faster, more secure Internet.

Until next time — see you again soon! 🇸🇦

Day 3 at Black Hat Riyadh — Building What’s Next

Our final day in the mini theatre runs from 1:30 PM to 5:30 PM, and we’re ending strong with sessions focused on building, securing, and scaling the modern Internet.

We’ll begin by looking at how teams can build full-stack applications at the edge using Cloudflare’s serverless platform. Then we’ll revisit the Connectivity Cloud, highlighting how it enables a unified, secure network architecture.

Later, we’ll dig into the future of cloud-native email security, and finally, we’ll close the event with another deep dive into how Cloudflare AI is powering next-gen enterprise security and productivity.

It’s the perfect way to wrap up three days of innovation, insights, and real-world solutions. See you there — and one last visit to Booth H1.N10 is always a good idea.

Elementor uses Cloudflare from day one to automatically scale, accelerate, and protect their platform, achieving 30% traffic acceleration and advanced threat prevention. Read how. https://cfl.re/48tomdP

Today we’re at Proptech Melbourne, discussing one of the biggest shifts reshaping the property and built-environment sector: AI adoption and how to keep it secure, compliant, and trustworthy. 

Our Field CISO, Volker Rath, just delivered a compelling session on how AI is transforming proptech, covering:

✴️ ⁠Smart buildings & digital assets under AI pressure
✴️ ⁠Malicious and AI-powered bots targeting property platforms
✴️ ⁠Responsible AI adoption inside your organisation
✴️ ⁠Building secure AI solutions that scale with your assets

The message was clear: AI is reshaping proptech faster than any previous wave, but innovation only works when security comes first.

It’s the final day of KubeCon Atlanta 2025!
 
Don’t miss your last chance to meet Cloudflare at Booth 557. 
We're showcasing our developer platform, serverless containers and more.

Swing by, let's chat about whatever you're building and how we can support you!

As the day continues at Cloudflare Immerse Zurich 2025, we’re diving deep into the future of secure connectivity and intelligent automation.

•⁠ ⁠Sebastian Scherl showcased how effortless integration and security come together in the Connectivity Cloud — simplifying complex architectures across industries.
•⁠ ⁠Nikola Novoselec (Swiss Post) shared how Swiss Post is future-proofing its tech stack — reducing cost, complexity, and attack surface across a vast enterprise.
•⁠ ⁠Ervis D. (MediaMarktStaturn) showcased why it’s time AI pays for the knowledge it
consumes in the battle for web revenue.
•⁠ ⁠Melody Huang walked us through the next frontier: Agentic AI — and how organizations can build for intelligence, security, and adaptability.
•⁠ ⁠Vânia Gonçalves introduced the latest on Post-Quantum Cryptography, exploring how Cloudflare is preparing customers for the security challenges of tomorrow.

Innovation, performance, and trust — live from Zurich.

🤖 Most AI tools just retrieve info — what if they could actually do things?
Join Patrick Gryczka (Cloudflare) at #AWSreInvent for
 “Browser Power: Building MCP Tools That Do Real Work.”

See how to build headless browsing MCP tools on Cloudflare that log in, solve CAPTCHAs, and perform automated tasks!

Ready to modernize your legacy applications without breaking the bank? Join us on November 25th for a power-packed and interactive webinar! Discover practical strategies to transform monoliths into microservices, leverage Workers, Durable Objects, D1 Databases, and gain actionable AI-driven strategies. Register now! https://cfl.re/3WSSlqa

Learn how Cloudflare helps you manage shadow AI by discovering what AI apps your workforce uses and evaluate the risks those apps present. 

To go deeper on how Cloudflare can help you confidently scale AI security, visit https://lnkd.in/dTRWEYUJ

Real-world innovation, Swiss precision.

This afternoon at Cloudflare Immerse Zurich, customers took the stage to share how they’re tackling complexity, securing operations, and building digital trust — all with the Connectivity Cloud at their core.

•⁠ ⁠Arne Moor (Ärztekasse) explored how his team built resilient, scalable infrastructure to support secure healthcare innovation.
•⁠ ⁠Diego D. (Frontiers Media SA) discussed why Frontiers bet on Cloudflare to stay fast, agile, and protected in a global research environment.
•⁠ ⁠Marc Schär (Migros Online) took us behind the scenes of their DDoS mitigation journey — ensuring reliability for millions of Swiss shoppers.

From healthcare to media to retail, the message is clear: secure, unified connectivity is driving innovation at scale.

Let's explore the fundamentals of Saltstack and how we use it at Cloudflare. We also explain how we built the infrastructure to reduce release delays due to Salt failures on the edge by over 5%. https://cfl.re/3LEyUis

✨ Grüezi from Cloudflare Immerse Zurich 2025! ✨

We’re live at the Park Hyatt Zurich, where the energy is already high as Switzerland’s tech and business leaders gather for a full day of insights, innovation, and collaboration.

The afternoon opened with Dominic Coyle (Sales Director, Switzerland) welcoming attendees and setting the tone for the day: simplifying security, scaling innovation, and staying resilient in an ever-evolving digital landscape.

Right after, Christian Reilly (Field CTO, EMEA) and Max I. (Field CISO) shared A View from the C-Suite — exploring how the Connectivity Cloud empowers organizations to connect, protect, and innovate with agility.

📍 Stay tuned from Zurich as we dive into real-world customer stories, AI, Zero Trust, and the future of secure connectivity across Switzerland and beyond.

As organizations modernize their apps in the cloud, legacy tools can’t keep up. 

Join our webinar to see how Cloudflare’s cloud-native platform delivers faster performance, stronger security, and simpler operations helping global brands streamline and scale effortlessly.

🌐 Internet Weather and Network Plumbing
In this week’s episode of This Week in NET, Cloudflare’s Tom Strickx talks about what really keeps the Internet alive.

We discuss:
✅ The hidden fragility of global networks
⚙️ How automation and AI improve reliability
🌍 Real stories from data centers and submarine cables
💡 Why “Internet weather” is a real thing engineers deal with daily

A grounded, human look at the systems that keep the world online.

📺 Watch: https://lnkd.in/d2MhGyXa
🌐 More episodes: ThisWeekinNET.com￼

👉 Register now and join us: https://cfl.re/48pdX4D

We can’t wait to see you there!

🎙️ New This Week in NET episode: Why the Internet Works (Most of the Time)

Cloudflare Principal Network Engineer Tom Strickx breaks down what really keeps the Internet alive, from submarine cables and routing mishaps to automation, AI in network operations, and the human trust that keeps it all together.

A rare, behind-the-scenes look at how the global network holds up (and why it sometimes doesn’t).

📺 Watch: https://lnkd.in/dvj8n8sk

🇲🇽 Insights from Peer Point CDMX: 
Accelerating the AI Journey 🇲🇽

Yesterday's conversations at our first Peer Point CDMX in Mexico City were truly insightful. We heard directly from our customers about the strategic shift AI is driving across every industry.

The consensus? AI is changing everything, and the challenge is moving fast securely.

That's precisely where Cloudflare Secure AI shines. By unifying security, connectivity, and our developer platform, we provide the foundation for you to implement your AI strategy with confidence, speed, and without compromise.

A huge thank you to our customers for the great discussions. We're excited to partner with you on the future of AI!

Is your security model ready for the modern threat landscape? 

🛑 Our Mini Theatre sessions are focused on moving Beyond the Perimeter with Zero Trust and robust API defense.

If you're managing enterprise security, you can't miss these critical updates:

✴️ 12:30: Zero Trust Connectivity: A new dimension for Browser Isolation and 14:30: Zero Trust in the Era of Artificial Intelligence with Qusay Raghib. Learn how to secure access for a dispersed workforce and what AI means for your Zero Trust strategy.

✴️ 11:00 & 16:00: API Security Unchained: Why Relying on a WAF Isn't Enough with Cagdas Barak. APIs are the new attack vector—discover the comprehensive solutions needed to protect them.

✴️ 13:30 & 15:00: Powering the Next Generation of Enterprise with Cloudflare AI with Samer Hasan. See the practical applications of AI-powered performance and security in the enterprise.

Join us to future-proof your network and security stack. Time to ditch the old perimeter!

Day 3 at GITEX Global in Dubai— What a day for Cloudflare! 

From thought-provoking conversations to packed sessions, today was all about redefining what’s possible in cybersecurity and AI.

A special highlight — Christian Reilly, Field CTO, EMEA at Cloudflare, joined Charles Aunger, Group CIO at American Hospital Dubai, for an inspiring talk on “Redefining Cyber Security for the AI Era.” The audience was fully engaged, sparking powerful discussions about the future of secure innovation.

We’ve loved connecting with so many forward-thinking professionals across industries — thank you to everyone who stopped by our booth, shared ideas, and explored how Cloudflare is helping build a faster, more secure, AI-driven Internet.

Stay tuned for the final days of #GITEX2025 — we’re just getting started. 💪🌐

Let’s get ethical.

On this week's AI Avenue episode, Yorick and I find out where AI actually gets all of its information. Our friend Amanda Haskell from Anthropic joins us to discuss how we can use AI more ethically and responsibly.

Episodes 1-4 are now out on https://aiavenue.show !

#AIResponsibly #CreateResponsibly #AIAvenue

Resolving network connectivity issues can be complex and time-consuming. That's why we're leveraging the power of AI to simplify the process for Cloudflare WARP users.

This new feature allows you to quickly self-diagnose and resolve common WARP client and network issues with intelligent, AI-powered insights. This not only speeds up the troubleshooting process but also improves the overall user experience.

Watch our team explain how it works in this dedicated segment on Cloudflare TV: https://lnkd.in/dSywGyzr 

#Cloudflare #AI #Networking #Troubleshooting #WARP #ITSupport

What a close to Day 2 at #ANDICOM! It was a privilege to join the "Cybersecurity Panel: Digital Armor – AI as a Defense Against Cyber Threats" discussion. The central theme was clear: as cyber threats are increasingly powered by AI, our defenses must be as well.

A special thanks to Pedro Alejandro Suarez and the other panelists, as well as the audience, for the great conversation. The future of cybersecurity is an intelligent, adaptive shield, and it was exciting to discuss the role of AI in making that a reality.

#Cloudflare #Ciberseguridad #Andicom #IA #AI #Cybersecurity

🇲🇾 Closing out our ISACA Malaysia Chapter #CIAG2025 conference tour with a powerful finish in Kuala Lumpur!

What an incredible 2-day journey — engaging with industry experts, exchanging bold ideas, and seeing the future of cybersecurity in action. Huge thanks to our speaker Edwin Wong for delivering an eye-opening session on resetting the cybersecurity playbook — rethinking defense strategies from the ground up to secure networks, apps, APIs, and AI workloads under one unified platform.

💡 Key takeaways from the session:
🔹 Safeguard AI workloads from next-gen threats & breaches
🔹 Detect & neutralize AI-driven phishing and bots in real time
🔹 Enforce ZeroTrust across hybrid & multi-cloud ecosystems
🔹 Protect APIs & apps from abuse and automation
🔹 Accelerate AI-powered apps at the edge with Cloudflare’s global network
🔹 Future-proof digital infrastructure for the AI era

📅 And we’re not stopping here. Next up: the ISACA Singapore Chapter Zero Trust Masterclass Workshop with Cloudflare Singapore team. 🚀

👉 Dive deeper into how #ZeroTrust is redefining enterprise security in the AI era. Secure your seat now: https://lnkd.in/g3CGPkJJ

Connect, protect, and build together: What to expect at Cloudflare Connect in Las Vegas!  

While others debate the future of the Internet, industry leaders will be shaping it at Cloudflare Connect 2025 (October 13-16, Las Vegas). This isn't just another conference—it's where innovative ideas become actionable solutions.

Join us for an inside look at what makes Connect a must-attend event. Here’s what you’ll preview:
✴️ Critical topics in scaling AI, modernizing applications, simplifying security, and future-proofing networks
✴️ Career advancement paths through Cloudflare University certification programs
✴️ Hands-on learning opportunities with the latest Cloudflare products

As an added bonus, attendees of the webinar will be entered for a chance to win a complimentary Cloudflare Connect pass (a $695 value).*

💥 What a night! Over 150+ developers, engineers, and tech practitioners packed the room for a high-energy, build-for-builders evening – brought to life in collaboration with DevOps Malaysia.

We’re at a new inflection point in software development, and it was incredible to bring together Malaysia’s brightest DevOps and AI minds for an interactive deep dive into the future of secure, intelligent app development.

From serverless Multimodal AI to Cloudflare’s containerized developer platform and RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) – we showcased how these cutting-edge innovations are enabling teams to build and scale apps securely and efficiently, from the ground up.

🎤 Massive thanks to our powerhouse speakers who brought the tech to life:
Tevanraj Elengoe – Organizer, DevOps Malaysia
Clement Wong – Head of Solutions Architecture and CoE, Cloudflare APAC
Mark Dembo – Senior Manager, Developer Solutions GTM, Cloudflare
Abhishek Kankani– Head of ETI, Cloudflare India
Amirul Zharfan Zalid – Digital Solutions Engineer, Cloudflare ASEAN
Sean Lim – Digital Solutions Engineer, Cloudflare ASEAN

Thank you to everyone who joined us. At Cloudflare, we're building more than just technology – we're building a community. Let’s keep sharing, learning, and building – together.

#DevOps #Developers #RAG #Serverless #AI-Powered #WorkersAI #MultimodalAI #Containerized #CyberSecurity #EverywhereSecurity #CyberResilience #ConnectivityCloud #DigitalModernization

company_updates.reshared_post_description:
🚨 𝗧𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁 𝗔𝗹𝗲𝗿𝘁 | 𝗖𝘆𝗯𝗲𝗿𝗣𝗲𝗮𝗰𝗲 𝗕𝘂𝗶𝗹𝗱𝗲𝗿𝘀

We identified a coordinated phishing campaign targeting nonprofits. The emails carried .zip attachments laced with 𝗙𝗼𝗿𝗺𝗯𝗼𝗼𝗸 𝗺𝗮𝗹𝘄𝗮𝗿𝗲, capable of silently stealing credentials, documents, and other sensitive data.

Thanks to Cloudflare 𝗘𝗺𝗮𝗶𝗹 𝗦𝗲𝗰𝘂𝗿𝗶𝘁𝘆, all malicious emails were blocked before reaching inboxes. “One click could have opened the door to full system compromise,” noted one of our analysts.

The campaign used a single reply-to address: 𝗹𝗮𝘃𝗶𝘀[.]𝗯𝗮𝗶𝗹𝗹𝗶𝗲[@]𝗴𝗺𝗮𝗶𝗹[.]𝗰𝗼𝗺, and targeted organizations in healthcare, human rights, and humanitarian aid.

Nonprofits shouldn't face cyber threats alone. This is exactly why 𝗖𝘆𝗯𝗲𝗿𝗣𝗲𝗮𝗰𝗲 𝗕𝘂𝗶𝗹𝗱𝗲𝗿𝘀 exists. 

👉 Join: https://cpb.ngo

#CyberSecurity #Phishing #Formbook #CyberPeace #Nonprofits #EmailSecurity #CyberPeaceBuilders #Cloudflare Patrick Day Alissa Starzak Jocelyn Woolbright Fabien Leimgruber Alexandru Lazar Adrien Ogee Francesca Bosco Stéphane Duguin

company_updates.description:
Today we were excited to present at the Gartner Security & Risk Management Summit in São Paulo alongside Nuvemshop, a great example of how our connectivity cloud helps digital leaders unify connectivity, security, and development.

A big thank you to Thiago Borges from Nuvemshop for their partnership! It's been inspiring to see how they've leveraged Cloudflare to support their customers, accelerating their time to market, protecting their services, minimizing downtime, and improving the overall customer experience. 

We look forward to continuing our work together to build a better, more connected internet.


#Cloudflare #Nubemshop #Gartner #DigitalTransformation #Cybersecurity #Innovation #CustomerSuccess

🎙 100 episodes of This Week in NET (TWiN)!
To celebrate this milestone, we sat down with John Graham-Cumming, Cloudflare’s former CTO and current board member, who started the show with João Tomé back in 2022.

From Universal SSL to the creation of the developers' platform Workers, John reflects on Cloudflare’s biggest moments, the importance of the Cloudflare blog, and more.

Watch the full episode here: https://lnkd.in/d64YNMkz

#Cloudflare #ThisWeekInNET #Workers #UniversalSSL #CloudflareBlog

The most interesting thing in tech: Cloudflare has built a new tool that allows publishers to identify, track, and block any AI bots that are scraping their sites without permission. Here Gitesh Gohel and I explain the spreadsheet we've built to decide who to block --- and then we start blocking. It feels like an important moment where the balance of power is shifting back to creators and away from companies who have scraped with impunity and without any fair exchange of value.

Can't believe John and I started This Week in NET back in 2022. Three years, four seasons, and 100 episodes later, it's still going strong! We’re celebrating episode 100 in two parts: this recent chat I had with John, and clips from our amazing guests (part 2 coming soon).
Stay tuned, geek out!
